## Summary
Describe what changed and why.

## Type of Change
- [ ] CAD update
- [ ] STL export update
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Other

## Validation
- [ ] Opened and checked Fusion 360 source (`.f3z`)
- [ ] Verified STL files are current
- [ ] Added/updated screenshots if needed

## Visuals
Attach before/after images when geometry changes.

## Checklist
- [ ] No unrelated files were modified
- [ ] Folder structure is preserved
- [ ] README/docs updated if required
